research_experience.title: Dr. Venkatesan's Semiconductor Research Lab
bullets: Fabricate high-aspect-ratio (HAR) micro- and nanostructures using cleanroom-based photolithography, reactive ion etching (RIE), and pulsed laser deposition (PLD)
Assist in optimizing anisotropic plasma etch parameters (gas chemistry, RF power, pressure) to achieve vertical sidewalls and controlled feature depth
Support end-to-end process development for HAR structures, including resist patterning, etch selectivity considerations, and post-process inspection
Document fabrication workflows and experimental results to ensure reproducibility and device characterization readiness

research_experience.title: Cloud Microphysics Group
bullets: Modeled cloud microphysical properties and atmospheric profiles using Python, applying numerical methods and statistical analysis
Analyzed simulation outputs to identify physical trends and evaluate modeling assumptions

research_experience.title: Light-Matter Interaction Research (Dr. Tischler)
bullets: Conducted literature reviews on light-matter interactions in silicon carbide nanocrystals relevant to wide-bandgap semiconductors
Gained exposure to optical spectroscopy and pulsed-laser experimental systems

work_experience.title: Student Learning Center
bullets: Mentored 40+ students per semester in Physics I-II, Calculus I-III, and General Chemistry I using structured quantitative problem-solving methods

work_experience.title: Sooner Competitive Robotics
bullets: Designed robot power distribution architecture to ensure stable voltage delivery under dynamic load conditions
Developed CAD layouts for electrical component placement, wire routing, and mechanical integration

work_experience.title: United World College Lao PDR National Committee
bullets: Led fundraising efforts exceeding $2,500+ to subsidize logistics and accommodations for scholarship candidates
Coordinated communication among alumni, scholars, volunteers, and partner organizations

work_experience.title: Association of Southeast Asian Nations at OU
bullets: Secured $1,000+ in external funding through proposals and outreach to 20+ donors
